title: Neon Pulse
prompt:
Create a modern 184-second Nu Disco song for a web radio / web TV broadcast. 

Mood: Uplifting, energetic, driving, nostalgic but modern.
Tempo: 120 BPM.
Style: Clean, polished, radio-ready, danceable, with a focus on groove and catchy elements.
Production: Highly polished, modern production techniques, tight mixing and mastering, lush reverb on vocals and synths, sidechain compression on bass.
Instruments: Synthesizers (pads, leads, arpeggiators), electric bass (driving and melodic), drum machine (tight 4/4 kick, snappy claps, hi-hats), electric guitar (clean, shimmering chords and subtle rhythmic fills), vocal chops.

Structure:
0:00 - 0:14 intro: Synthesizer pad swells in, establishing the harmonic foundation, subtle hi-hat rhythm begins.
0:14 - 0:51 verse/groove: Bassline and drum machine enter, establishing a driving groove. Synthesizer arpeggio adds melodic interest.
0:51 - 1:09 build/pre-chorus: Filtered synthesizer rises in intensity, percussion builds, subtle vocal chops layered in as texture.
1:09 - 1:46 chorus/drop/main hook: Energetic synthesizer lead line emerges, vocal chops become more prominent and rhythmic, bassline intensifies.
1:46 - 2:23 second verse or soft bridge:  Beat breaks down slightly, introducing a more atmospheric synthesizer pad, vocal chops become more subtle again.
2:23 - 2:56 final chorus/drop/main hook: Full energy returns, with layered synthesizers and driving bassline, vocal chops at their peak.
2:56 - 3:04 final chorus continues with smooth fade out

Vocals: Modern vocal chops used as textural elements – short, rhythmic fragments of vocals processed with reverb and delay, creating a catchy and danceable vibe. No discernible lyrics or spoken words.

Lyrics: N/A

The final 8 seconds must fade out smoothly and naturally. No abrupt ending. No spoken outro.

Negative Prompt: low quality, distorted vocals, out of tune vocals, bad timing, messy mix, muddy bass, harsh highs, old-fashioned arrangement, theatrical singing, opera vocals, excessive vibrato, abrupt ending, spoken outro, crackle, noise, clipping, overcompressed, random tempo changes, long silence.
